task_completion.description: Verify unauthorized bookmarks are deleted and manufacturing folders are created on the bookmark bar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome bookmark bar or Bookmark Manager shows folders named 'Metrology', 'SPC Dashboards', 'ISO & Standards', and 'Tooling'. No bookmarks or icons for ESPN, Netflix, Facebook, Twitter, Amazon, or YouTube are visible.

task_completion.description: Verify Chrome font sizes are set to the specified values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings > Appearance > Customize fonts, the 'Font size' (or Standard font) is set to 22, 'Minimum font size' is set to 16, and 'Fixed-width font' is set to 20.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Force Dark Mode for Web Contents' is enabled in Chrome flags.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the chrome://flags page, the experiment 'Auto Dark Mode for Web Contents' (or similar Force Dark Mode setting) is shown with its dropdown set to 'Enabled'.

task_completion.description: Verify cookies are set to clear on exit and password saving is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings, the toggle for 'Clear cookies and site data when you close all windows' (or 'Delete data settings' on exit) is turned ON. In Password Manager settings, 'Offer to save passwords' is toggled OFF.

task_completion.description: Verify the custom McMaster search engine is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings > Search engine > Manage search engines and site search, there is an entry with the keyword 'mcmaster' and the URL 'https://www.mcmaster.com/find/%s'.

task_completion.description: Verify the download location and prompt settings are correct.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings > Downloads, the Location path ends with '/home/ga/Documents/CMM_Reports' and the toggle for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' is turned ON.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual Chrome browser GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating Chrome's settings menus, bookmark manager, and flags page, rather than using a terminal to edit Chrome's JSON preference files or SQLite databases.

integrity.description: Ensure the bookmark folders are actual Chrome UI elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The folders 'Metrology', 'SPC Dashboards', etc., appear in the actual Chrome bookmark bar with standard folder icons, not as text written in a document or a mockup.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent didn't just type the expected outcomes into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visual evidence of completion must be within the Chrome browser interface, not a text editor displaying the SOP or a summary of completed actions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Unauthorized bookmarks to verify as deleted: espn.com, netflix.com, facebook.com, twitter.com, amazon.com, youtube.com. Expected bookmark folders: 'Metrology', 'SPC Dashboards', 'ISO & Standards', 'Tooling'. Target font sizes: Default=22, Fixed-width=20, Minimum=16. Custom search engine keyword: 'mcmaster'. Download directory must be exactly 'CMM_Reports'.
